fact_inclusion_score.name: Fact Inclusion Score
fact_inclusion_score.logic: Key facts are split by semicolons. An LLM judge checks each fact against the email (PRESENT/MISSING). Score = (present / total) × 100.

tone_alignment_score.name: Tone Alignment Score
tone_alignment_score.logic: An LLM judge rates tone match on a 1-5 Likert rubric. Normalized: ((likert - 1) / 4) × 100.

professional_quality_score.name: Professional Quality Score
professional_quality_score.logic: Composite of 3 equally weighted sub-scores: (A) Structural completeness heuristic, (B) Readability & word-count heuristic, (C) Grammar fluency via LLM-as-a-Judge.

scenarios.intent: Follow up after a sales meeting
scenarios.key_facts: Met on June 5 at the client's Chicago office; discussed the Enterprise Analytics platform; client requested a custom demo by June 20; primary contact is VP of Data, Priya Sharma
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Next Steps on Enterprise Analytics Platform Discussion

Dear Priya,

I wanted to personally follow up on our meeting at your Chicago office on June 5. It was a pleasure discussing how our Enterprise Analytics platform can support your team's goals and objectives.

As we agreed during our conversation, I am working on arranging a custom demo tailored to your specific needs. You can expect to receive this by June 20, as requested. In the meantime, if you have any additional questions or would like to discuss further, please don't hesitate to reach out.

I appreciate the time you took to meet with me and explore how our solution can benefit your organization. I look forward to sharing the demo with you soon and continuing our discussion.

Best regards,
Elena Marquez
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Great Meeting on June 5 — Next Steps

Hi Priya,

Thank you for taking the time to meet with us at your Chicago office on June 5. It was a pleasure discussing how our Enterprise Analytics platform can support your team's goals.

As promised, we are preparing a custom demo tailored to your requirements and will have it ready for you by June 20. I will send over a calendar invite shortly so we can walk through it together.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if any questions come up in the meantime.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

details.fact: discussed the Enterprise Analytics platform

details.reason: Mentioned in the email as the agreed-upon deadline

tone_alignment.justification: The email is polite, courteous, and informative, striking a perfect balance between professionalism and friendliness.

scenarios.intent: Request for proposal details from a vendor
scenarios.key_facts: Project is a new warehouse management system; budget cap is \$500K; proposal deadline is August 1; vendor must include SLA terms and implementation timeline
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Request for Proposal: Warehouse Management System

Dear Vendor Team,

I am writing to formally request a proposal from your company for the development and implementation of a new warehouse management system. This project is a key initiative for our organization, and we are seeking a comprehensive solution that meets our operational needs.

As we move forward, please note that our budget cap for this project is \$500,000. Your proposal should include a detailed breakdown of costs, as well as a clear implementation timeline and Service Level Agreement (SLA) terms. The SLA should outline the expected service standards, response times, and support processes.

To ensure timely review and consideration, please submit your proposal no later than August 1. We appreciate your attention to these requirements and look forward to reviewing your submission.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions or require further clarification on any aspect of the proposal.

Best regards,
Elena Marquez
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Request for Proposal — Warehouse Management System

Dear Vendor Team,

We are currently evaluating solutions for a new warehouse management system and would like to invite you to submit a proposal. Our budget for this project is capped at \$500,000.

Please ensure your proposal includes detailed SLA terms and a comprehensive implementation timeline. All submissions must be received no later than August 1.

Should you require additional information about our requirements, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

details.fact: Project is a new warehouse management system
details.reason: Explicitly mentioned in the email

details.fact: budget cap is $500K
details.reason: Mentioned in the email with a detailed breakdown requirement

details.fact: proposal deadline is August 1
details.reason: Clearly stated in the email

details.fact: vendor must include SLA terms and implementation timeline
details.reason: Required in the proposal as per the email

tone_alignment.justification: The email maintains a professional and polished tone throughout, using formal language and avoiding contractions, making it a perfect match for the requested formal tone.

scenarios.key_facts: Order #88421 was due on May 28; delay caused by supplier shortage; new estimated delivery is June 8; offering a 15% discount on next order as compensation
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Apology for Delayed Shipment of Order #88421

Dear valued customer,

I am writing to offer my sincerest apologies for the delay in your shipment, Order #88421, which was originally due to arrive on May 28. Unfortunately, we have been impacted by an unforeseen supplier shortage that has affected our ability to meet our usual delivery timelines.

Please be assured that we are working diligently to get your order to you as soon as possible. Our new estimated delivery date is June 8, and we will notify you as soon as your order ships. We understand the inconvenience this has caused and want to assure you that we are taking immediate action to prevent such delays in the future.

As a gesture of goodwill and apology for the delay, we would like to offer you a 15% discount on your next order. We value your business and appreciate your patience and understanding during this time.

If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you for your continued support.

Sincerely,
Elena Marquez
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Sincere Apologies for the Delay on Order #88421

Dear Customer,

I sincerely apologize for the delay in delivering your order #88421, which was originally due on May 28. Unfortunately, an unexpected supplier shortage impacted our fulfillment schedule.

We have expedited processing and your updated delivery estimate is June 8. To express our regret, we would like to offer you a 15% discount on your next order.

We truly value your patience and your business. Please reach out if there is anything else we can do.

With sincere apologies,
[Your Name]

details.fact: Order #88421 was due on May 28
details.reason: mentioned in the email as the original due date

details.fact: delay caused by supplier shortage
details.reason: stated in the email as the reason for the delay

details.fact: new estimated delivery is June 8
details.reason: given in the email as the new estimated delivery date

details.fact: offering a 15% discount on next order as compensation
details.reason: mentioned in the email as a gesture of goodwill

tone_alignment.justification: The email consistently conveys empathy and apology through phrases like 'sincerest apologies', 'understand the inconvenience', and 'gesture of goodwill', demonstrating a genuine understanding of the customer's frustration and a commitment to making it right.

scenarios.key_facts: New remote-work policy effective July 1; employees may work from home up to 3 days per week; manager approval required for fully remote arrangements; updated policy document available on the HR portal
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Update to Remote-Work Policy

Dear Colleagues,

As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance work-life balance and flexibility, we are introducing an updated remote-work policy. Effective July 1, employees will be able to work from home up to three days per week, providing more autonomy to manage your schedules.

Please note that while this policy offers greater flexibility, it still requires manager approval for any fully remote arrangements. We encourage you to discuss your specific needs and arrangements with your supervisor to ensure alignment with team and business objectives.

The updated policy document is now available on the HR portal for your reference. We recommend reviewing the document to understand the details and guidelines surrounding this new policy.

If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to your manager or the HR department.

Best regards,
Elena Marquez
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Updated Remote-Work Policy — Effective July 1

Dear Team,

I am writing to inform you of an update to our remote-work policy, effective July 1. Under the new guidelines, employees may work from home up to three days per week.

Fully remote arrangements will require prior manager approval. The complete policy document is now available on the HR portal for your review.

If you have questions, please reach out to your manager or the HR team.

Thank you,
[Your Name]

details.fact: New remote-work policy effective July 1
details.reason: Mentioned in the email as 'Effective July 1'

details.fact: employees may work from home up to 3 days per week
details.reason: Stated in the email as 'up to three days per week'

details.fact: manager approval required for fully remote arrangements
details.reason: Mentioned in the email as 'requires manager approval for any fully remote arrangements'

details.fact: updated policy document available on the HR portal
details.reason: Stated in the email as 'The updated policy document is now available on the HR portal'

tone_alignment.justification: The email provides factual information about the updated policy, explains the requirements and guidelines, and maintains a neutral tone without expressing personal opinions or emotions.

scenarios.intent: Invite a speaker to a company conference
scenarios.key_facts: Conference name: Innovate 2025; date is October 14–15 in Austin, TX; keynote slot is 45 minutes; honorarium of \$5,000 plus travel covered
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Invitation to Keynote at Innovate 2025 Conference

Dear [Speaker's Name],

I am thrilled to invite you to be a keynote speaker at our upcoming Innovate 2025 conference, taking place on October 14-15 in the vibrant city of Austin, TX. Your expertise and insights would be a fantastic addition to our event, and we believe your presence would greatly inspire and engage our attendees.

We have a 45-minute keynote slot reserved for you, providing ample opportunity to share your thoughts and experiences with our audience. As a token of our appreciation, we are offering an honorarium of $5,000, and we will also cover all your travel expenses to ensure your participation is both rewarding and hassle-free.

Innovate 2025 is designed to bring together innovators, thought leaders, and industry experts to explore the latest trends and advancements. Your contribution would be invaluable in making this event a success, and we would be honored if you could join us.

Please let us know if this opportunity interests you, and we will be delighted to discuss further details.

Best regards,
Elena Marquez
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Speaking Invitation — Innovate 2025

Dear Dr. [Last Name],

We would be honored to have you deliver a keynote address at Innovate 2025, our flagship conference taking place October 14–15 in Austin, TX.

The keynote slot is 45 minutes, and we are offering an honorarium of \$5,000, with all travel expenses covered. Your insights would be an incredible addition to the event.

We truly hope you will consider this invitation and would be happy to discuss any details. Looking forward to hearing from you!

Warmly,
[Your Name]

scenarios.intent: Urgent request to reschedule a board meeting
scenarios.key_facts: Original date was July 22; CEO is unavailable due to emergency travel; proposed new date is July 29; agenda remains unchanged
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Urgent: Rescheduling of Board Meeting

Dear Board Members,

I am writing to request an urgent change to our upcoming board meeting, originally scheduled for July 22. Due to unforeseen emergency travel, our CEO is no longer available to attend on this date.

In light of this development, we propose rescheduling the meeting to July 29. Please be assured that the agenda for the meeting remains unchanged, and all previously distributed materials will still be relevant.

I would appreciate it if you could confirm your availability for the new date as soon as possible, given the time-sensitive nature of this request.

Thank you for your understanding and prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Elena Marquez
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: URGENT — Board Meeting Rescheduled to July 29

Dear Board Members,

I am writing to inform you that the board meeting originally scheduled for July 22 must be rescheduled. Due to emergency travel obligations, our CEO will be unavailable on that date.

We propose moving the meeting to July 29. The agenda will remain unchanged. Please confirm your availability at your earliest convenience so we can finalize logistics.

Thank you for your understanding and flexibility.

Regards,
[Your Name]

scenarios.key_facts: New hire is Alex Kim, Senior Software Engineer; starting on Monday, August 12; will be on the Platform Infrastructure team; buddy/mentor is Jessica Tran
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: A Warm Welcome to Alex Kim

Hi Team,

I'm beyond excited to announce that Alex Kim is joining our crew as a Senior Software Engineer on the Platform Infrastructure team, starting this Monday, August 12. We're stoked to have Alex on board and can't wait to see the amazing things they'll accomplish.

To help Alex get up to speed, Jessica Tran has graciously offered to be their buddy and mentor. Jessica will show Alex the ropes, introduce them to the rest of the team, and make sure they have everything they need to thrive in their new role.

Let's all give Alex a warm welcome and make them feel part of the team from day one. If you see Alex around, be sure to say hi and introduce yourself.

Looking forward to seeing the incredible contributions I know Alex will make.

Best,
Elena Marquez

I'm excited to let you know that Alex Kim will be joining us as a Senior Software Engineer on the Platform Infrastructure team starting Monday, August 12!

Jessica Tran will be Alex's buddy and mentor, so please help make the first few weeks awesome. Feel free to swing by and say hello.

Let's give Alex a warm welcome!

Cheers,
[Your Name]

scenarios.key_facts: Proposal was for co-branded marketing campaign; does not align with current brand strategy; open to revisiting in Q1 next year; appreciate the detailed proposal they sent
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Response to Co-Branded Marketing Campaign Proposal

Dear [Proposer's Name],

I wanted to personally reach out and express my gratitude for the detailed proposal you submitted for a co-branded marketing campaign. We appreciate the time and effort that went into crafting such a comprehensive plan.

After careful consideration, I regret to inform you that we will not be moving forward with the proposed partnership at this time. While we are impressed by your team's creativity, the initiative does not align with our current brand strategy.

Please know that we value the potential for collaboration and would be open to revisiting this opportunity in Q1 of next year, when our strategic priorities may have shifted. Your enthusiasm and expertise are truly appreciated, and we hope to have the chance to work together in the future.

Thank you again for your proposal, and we wish you continued success in your marketing endeavors.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Re: Co-Branded Marketing Campaign Proposal

Dear [Name],

Thank you for taking the time to put together such a detailed proposal for a co-branded marketing campaign. We genuinely appreciate the thought and effort behind it.

After careful review, we have determined that the initiative does not align with our current brand strategy. That said, we would be very open to revisiting this conversation in Q1 of next year as our priorities evolve.

We value the relationship and look forward to potential collaboration in the future.

Kind regards,
[Your Name]

details.fact: Proposal was for co-branded marketing campaign

details.fact: does not align with current brand strategy
details.reason: Stated as the reason for not moving forward

details.fact: open to revisiting in Q1 next year
details.reason: Explicitly mentioned as a future possibility

details.fact: appreciate the detailed proposal they sent
details.reason: Expressed gratitude for the proposal in the email

tone_alignment.justification: The email is courteous, considerate, and tactfully conveys a negative decision, maintaining a polite and diplomatic tone throughout.

scenarios.intent: Notify customers of scheduled system maintenance
scenarios.key_facts: Maintenance window: Saturday, September 6, 2:00–6:00 AM EST; services affected: payment processing and order tracking; expected downtime is up to 2 hours; no action required from customers
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Scheduled System Maintenance Notification

Dear Valued Customers,

We are writing to inform you that our system will undergo scheduled maintenance on Saturday, September 6, between 2:00 AM and 6:00 AM EST. During this time, you may experience temporary disruptions to our payment processing and order tracking services.

Please be assured that we expect the downtime to be no more than 2 hours, and our team is working diligently to minimize the impact on your experience. You do not need to take any action, as this maintenance is a routine measure to ensure the continued reliability and performance of our systems.

We appreciate your understanding and apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Thank you for your continued loyalty and cooperation.

Best regards,
Elena Marquez
scenarios.reference_email:
Subject: Scheduled Maintenance — September 6

Dear Valued Customer,

We want to let you know about a scheduled maintenance window on Saturday, September 6, from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM EST. During this period, payment processing and order tracking may be temporarily unavailable for up to 2 hours.

No action is required on your part. Our team will be working to complete the maintenance as quickly as possible to minimize any disruption.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best,
[Your Name]

details.fact: Maintenance window: Saturday, September 6, 2:00–6:00 AM EST
details.reason: Matching details in email

details.fact: services affected: payment processing and order tracking
details.reason: Services mentioned in email

details.fact: expected downtime is up to 2 hours
details.reason: Downtime duration mentioned in email

details.fact: no action required from customers
details.reason: Explicitly stated in email

tone_alignment.justification: The email is direct, informative, and apologetic, effectively conveying a clear and reassuring tone by providing specific details about the maintenance and its expected impact, while also expressing appreciation for the customers' understanding and offering support.

scenarios.intent: Request feedback on a draft report from a colleague
scenarios.key_facts: Report title: 2024 Sustainability Impact Assessment; deadline for feedback is Friday, June 14; focus areas: data accuracy in Section 3 and clarity of executive summary; report is attached as a PDF
scenarios.generated_email:
Subject: Feedback Request: 2024 Sustainability Impact Assessment Draft

Hi Team,

I've attached a draft of the 2024 Sustainability Impact Assessment report for your review. As we approach the final stages, I'd greatly appreciate your feedback to ensure we're delivering a high-quality output.

Could you please focus your comments on two key areas: data accuracy in Section 3 and the clarity of the executive summary? Your input will be invaluable in refining these sections.

To meet our timeline, kindly provide your feedback by Friday, June 14. If you have any questions or need further context, don't hesitate to reach out.

Thanks in advance for your time and insights.

Best regards,
Elena Marquez

Thanks in advance!

Best,
[Your Name]
